title: trisetum agrostideum
intro: Trisetum agrostideum, a type of grass-like plant belonging to the Poaceae family, is commonly known as needle grass. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Trisetum agrostideum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied externally to treat various health conditions.
